creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
issue while linking (missing -lSBJson):

/usr/bin/ld: warning: libSBJson.so.2, needed by ../SoObjects/SOGo/SOGo.framework/sogo/libSOGo.so, not found (try using -rpath or -rpath-link)
../SoObjects/SOGo/SOGo.framework/sogo/libSOGo.so: undefined reference to `__objc_class_name_SBJsonParser'
